MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To S.P. Richards Co.
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH'S Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To S.P. Richards Co. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

order and consent judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2021 Set For Trial On Aug-15-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
CROSS-DEFENDANT NCR CORPORATION'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

The verified application of Douglas W. Gilfillan for admission pro hac vice as counsel for cross-defendant is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40. The court notes that an application normally must be filed on at least 16 court days notice, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). (See Cal. R. Ct. 9.40(c)(1).)

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Order signed.
